=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Christchurch, New Zealand  	
Westpac Trust Entertainment Centre
2003.02.26

Lineage and taper.no info
Great sound


CD1

1 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, (Bob on piano, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass), 2 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, (Bob on piano & harp, Larry on pedal steel, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 3 Highway 61 Revisited, (Bob on Stratocaster, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass), 4 Just Like A Woman, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 5 Things Have Changed, (Bob on piano, Larry on Stratocaster, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 6 Cold Irons Bound, (Bob and Larry on Stratocasters, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 7 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic), 8 Desolation Row (acoustic), 9 Girl Of The North Country (acoustic), 10 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), (Bob on acoustic guitar and Larry on cittern),

CD2

1 Tell Me That It Isn't True, (Bob Stratocaster, Larry on pedal steel, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 2 Honest With Me, (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar, Billy on Telecaster, Tony on electric bass), 3 Bye And Bye, (Bob on piano, Larry on hollow body Gretch, Billy on thin bodied Gibson electric, Tony on standup bass), 4 Summer Days, (Bob on piano, Larry on hollow body Gretch, Billy on thin bodied Gibson electric, Tony on standup bass), (encore), 5 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) (Larry and Billy on backup vocals), 6 Like A Rolling Stone, (Bob on Stratocaster, Larry on Telecaster, Billy on thin bodied Gibson electric, Tony on electric bass), 7 All Along The Watchtower, (Bob on stratocaster and piano, Larry & Billy on Telecasters, Tony on electric bass) 


Concert # 1501 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 11 of the 2003 Tour Down Under. 2003 concert # 11.
Concert # 11 with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

7-10, 15 acoustic with the band.
2, 4 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 4, 11 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
10 Larry Campbell (cittern).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
